 Normal imaging results help rule out central causes. 
 All agents agree on these points, reinforcing the diagnosis of labyrinthitis.

 Common conditions like labyrinthitis, Meniere's disease, vestibular migraine, and bilateral vestibular pathologies have been ruled out.

 Autoimmune inner ear disease could also be a possibility, as it can cause bilateral hearing loss and vestibular symptoms.
